mapper.sql: select id, user_id, order_no, status, product_type, product_id, product_name, purchase_mode, activity_id, original_amount, discount_amount, payable_amount, points_amount, points_deduct_amount, coupon_id, created_time, paid_time, close_time, updated_time, delete_flag from osh_order
mapper.insert: insert into osh_order ( user_id, order_no, status, product_type, product_id, product_name, purchase_mode, activity_id, original_amount, discount_amount, payable_amount, points_amount, points_deduct_amount, coupon_id, created_time, paid_time, close_time, updated_time, delete_flag ) values ( #{userId}, #{orderNo}, #{status}, #{productType}, #{productId}, #{productName}, #{purchaseMode}, #{activityId}, #{originalAmount}, #{discountAmount}, #{payableAmount}, #{pointsAmount}, #{pointsDeductAmount}, #{couponId}, #{createdTime}, #{paidTime}, #{closeTime}, #{updatedTime}, #{deleteFlag} )
mapper.update: update osh_order set status = 1, paid_time = #{paidTime}, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP where order_no = #{orderNo} and status = 0
update osh_order set status = 2, close_time = #{closeTime}, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP where order_no = #{orderNo} and status = 0
